creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Hi,

For this PR, I have two suggestions.

Considering the difference of API model between 1.6.x and 1.8.x. [1][2]
I suggest to keep HDF5 1.6.x unchanged and import a new port for HDF5 1.8.x.
Currently we have HDF4, HDF5 1.6.x in ports.
In order to import HDF5 1.8.x, I suggest the following renaming of HDF ports:
    science/hdf  -> science/hdf4    (HDF4)
    science/hdf5 -> science/hdf16   (HDF5 1.6.x)
                    science/hdf18   (HDF5 1.8.x)
Please consider the coexistence of these versions.

Then, I think it would be better to use 1.8.1 release, not snapshot.
The tarball of 1.8.1 release is at ftp://ftp.hdfgroup.org/HDF5/current/src/hdf5-1.8.1.tar.bz2.
By the way, the official site of HDF is now at http://www.hdfgroup.org/.
Using *.hdfgroup.org URLs is much more stable.

Best regards,
Sunpoet

[1] http://www.hdfgroup.org/HDF5/release/obtain5.html
    Due to the number of major new features in 1.8, we are supporting two
    branches of HDF5. The 1.6 branch is for those 1.6 users who do not need
    the new features in 1.8 or are not ready to move to a major new release.
    We provide the HDF5 1.6.7 release for those users.
[2] http://www.hdfgroup.org/HDF5/doc/ADGuide/Changes.html
    A Release 1.6.x compatibility mode is provided enabling these and other
    Release 1.6.x compatibility features, but is available only if the HDF5
    Library is configured with the default settings or with the flag
    --with-default-api-version=v16.

-- 
                              Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@sunpoet.net>
